title: senna martiana
intro: Senna martiana is a plant species of the legume family, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, commonly known as a medicinal plant due to its cathartic properties. The plant contains sennosides, which have a laxative effect by stimulating the muscles in the intestinal walls to move waste through the digestive system, making it useful for treating constipation and other gastrointestinal issues. Senna martiana has been traditionally used to promote digestive health, relieve symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, and even help with weight loss by cleansing the body. Herbal preparations of Senna martiana can be found in the form of tea, capsules, or powders, often recommended for short-term use under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
